summary: Implemented chromatic dispersion fragment shader (US-059). Created chromaticDispersion.glsl with chromaticPoint() for gl_PointCoord-based RGB fringing on point systems and chromaticLine() for multiplicative RGB channel shift on line/mesh systems. Added uDispersion uniform to all 9 fragment shaders and 7 TypeScript geometry systems. Dispersion is computed in mappings.ts from combined bass+treble energy using pow(max(b,t)*0.5 + b*t*0.5, 1.5), scaled by motionAmplitude for reduced-motion support. The effect is zero at silence, subtle at moderate energy, and pronounced only when both bass and treble peak simultaneously. All 1352 tests pass, build succeeds cleanly.
